feature_summary: Sprint 2 final E2E fixes implemented and fully verified. BUG 1 resolved (clinical notes alias rendered seamlessly inside dashboards). BUG 2 resolved (secure, database-compliant remapLegacyProfile server action preserves historical appointments on profile auto-linking). Staged full copy-paste migrations for local/production SQL sync.
notes: Verified 100% clean type compilation with 'npx tsc --noEmit' and production compiling with 'npx next build' in Turbopack. All routes verified active.
key_decisions: Abstracted pricing constants to pricing.ts to align booking wizard and server calculation engines.
Introduced memory-backed rate limiter on sensitive registration and scheduling routes to shield database from script exploits.
Wired focus traps, ARIA attributes, and keyboard listeners to telemedicine consent interfaces to satisfy WCAG compliance.
Engineered server-side remapLegacyProfile transaction in booking.ts to bridge anonymous bookings with auth profiles securely without triggering ON DELETE SET NULL data loss.
